data.name: TR-PICUS-TIER2-SHADOW_COPY_DELETION_ADVANCED: Shadow Copy Deletion via WMI and Advanced Methods
data.description: HIGH PRIORITY RANSOMWARE PREPARATION DETECTION: Detects advanced shadow copy deletion methods observed in 7+ undetected Picus instances. While vssadmin.exe deletion is detected, threat actors use WMI-based deletion and batch script methods that bypass existing alerts. Monitors for WMI Win32_Volume operations, PowerShell volume manipulation, and fsutil journal deletion. Observable from detonation: powershell.exe executing WMI commands on volume objects, vssadmin.exe with delete shadows variants, batch scripts with advanced evasion. Critical for T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery) - classic ransomware preparation pattern.
data.contents: ((process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'cmd.exe') AND (process.command_line contains 'Win32_Volume' OR process.command_line contains 'shadow' OR process.command_line contains 'delete' OR process.command_line contains 'vssadmin' OR process.command_line contains 'diskshadow')) OR (process.name contains 'vssadmin.exe' AND (process.command_line contains 'delete' OR process.command_line contains 'shadows')) OR (process.name contains 'fsutil.exe' AND process.command_line contains 'usn' AND process.command_line contains 'deletejournal')

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Windows Command Shell

data.expectedCoverage: 7+ undetected shadow copy deletion instances via WMI and advanced methods
